summary: Bug fix verified: user_id is now properly passed from login response, stored in localStorage, and used in all API endpoints. Different users see their own progress. All 10 features tested and working correctly.

user_id_from_login: Login API returns user_id in response
user_id_stored_in_localStorage: handleLogin saves user_id to localStorage as 'onboarding_user_id'
Different users get different user_ids stored
progress_per_user: Task states are tracked per user_id

critical_code_review_comments: App.js handleLogin correctly extracts user_id from login response (line 31)
DashboardPage uses currentUserId from props/localStorage in all API calls
All user-specific endpoints include ?user_id= query parameter
seed_data_creation: Created user2@test.ru for testing different user progress
context_for_next_testing_agent: Bug fix for user_id passing is complete and working. Login response returns user_id, which is stored in localStorage as 'onboarding_user_id'. All API endpoints (tasks, stats, lessons, progress, toggle) correctly receive and use user_id parameter. Different users see their own progress.
